command: molecule-ranker discover --disease "Synthetic V3 read-only planning condition" --mode read_only_live --output-dir "$OUTPUT_DIR" --json
what_output_does_not_prove: No real-world evidence conclusion or clinical validity is proven.

what_output_means: The workflow can be configured for read-only live posture.
External writes are refused in this mode.
